summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Blogs 4 Blocks new features including Profile/Dashboard page, Rich Text Editor, and updated stats. All backend APIs (18/18) and frontend functionality working perfectly.
passed_tests: Homepage stats show 'Contributors' instead of 'Members' - backend updated correctly
Rich text editor loads on /write page with full toolbar (bold, italic, headings, lists, blockquote, code, alignments, links, etc.)
User registration and login flow functional with demo@b4b.com / password123
Profile page at /profile loads showing user name, city, email
Profile page shows 'My Posts' section with user's own posts (4 posts displayed)
Profile page shows 'Posts I've Engaged With' section for liked/commented posts (1 post displayed)
Color picker buttons functional on profile for both My Posts and Interacted Posts colors
Backend PUT /api/profile/colors updates and returns chosen colors correctly
Backend GET /api/profile/posts returns user's posts with required fields
Backend GET /api/profile/interactions returns posts user liked/commented with interaction flags
Backend GET /api/posts/{id}/comments/live returns comments in chat-like format
Liking posts as authenticated user works and tracks likes in backend
Clicking interacted post card opens discussion dialog with chat-style interface
Discussion dialog shows comment input form for logged-in users
Rich text content renders correctly as HTML on post detail pages
Navigation dropdown shows 'My Dashboard' option for logged-in users
All new profile APIs working: colors, posts, interactions, live comments
Guest post creation and expiry notice functionality intact
Post like functionality increments count correctly
